commits.message:
fix(showcase): commit coi-serviceworker.js so CI build includes it

It was gitignored, so 'npm ci && npm run build' on the runner produced a
dist/ without coi-serviceworker.js, which 404s at runtime and prevents
cross-origin isolation. Track the upstream Guido Zuidhof v0.1.7 file
verbatim — small (3KB), no maintenance, identical across versions.
